titleStmt.title: SII 30.175: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 175. (A.R. No. 253 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīsvara temple-on the east wall of the same maṇḍapa Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 23: 1035 A.D.

summary.p: This records the sale of 1225 kuḻi of land by the mahāsabhā of Parākramasōḻa -chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Dāmar-nāḍu in Dāmark-kōṭṭam to Vāṭkai Kārikuḍi Kārikuḍaiyāṉ of Veṟṟiyūr in Sōḻamaṇḍalam for eight kaḻañju of gold in order to provide food offerings to the deity Subrahmaṇyadēva (who is in the west of the village). Kāmakōṭi Bhaṭṭa of Pākkam, Chēttasanma-kramavittaṉ of Māṅgāḍu and others figure as signatories. A post script at the end of the inscription records the Śivabrāhmanā of Subrahmaṇyadēvar alias Sōḻakēraḷa temple of the same village received 100 kuḻi and agreed to burn a perpetual lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumannivaḷara virunila maṭaṉtaiyum porc ceyappāvaiyum cirttaṉic celviyum taṉ
perun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa ṉeṭu tuyalūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaiṉāṭu ntuṭarvaṉa velip
paṭarvaṉavāciyu cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇark karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭalīḻatta
raicatam muṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyar roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal tenṉavar vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum I
ntiran Āramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu Eṟipaṭaik keraḷan muṟaimaiyil cūṭuṅkulataṉamaākiya palarpukaḻ mu
ṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāval palpaḻantīvum ceruvil ciṉavelirupattoru kāl
Araicukaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvarum cāntimaṟ ṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum ce
yaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta śayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyal Iraṭṭapāṭiy E
ḻaraiyilakkamum navaṉeti kulapperu malaikaḷum cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirvaṭavallai matirai maṇṭalamum kāmiṭai
vaḷaiya nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veruviṟciṉavi pañcappaḷḷiyum pācuṭaipaḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvilvaṇkīrtti
(ayarvil vaṇkīrtti) Ātinakaravaiyil cantiraṉ tolkulattintirarataṉai viḷaiyamar kaḷattil kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉat
toṭu niṟaikulataṉak kuvaiyuṅ ciṭṭarum ceṟimiḷaiyoṭṭa viṣaiyamum pūcurar cerunal kocalaināṭum tammapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai co
lait taṇṭaputtiyu miraṇacūraṉait muraṇuṟattākki tikkaṇaik kīrtti takkanalāṭamum kovintacaṉthan māviḻintoṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamum
toṭukaṭal caṅkoṭaṭal mayipālaṉai veñcama(ḻa)r viḷākattañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittilaneṭuṅkaṭa
luttira lāṭamum veṟimalar tīttat teṟimalar kaṅkaiyu(m) malaikaṭal naṭuvil palakalañ celutti caṅkirāma vicaiyyottuṅka vinman kiṭārattarai
caṉai vākaiyam poru kaṭaṟṟumpakkariyoṭakappaṭutturimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamu mārttavaṉakaṉakar porttoḻil vācalil
viccātira toraṇamu mattoḷiṟ puṉamaṉip putavamuṅ kaṉamaṇikkatavamu niṟaicīr vicaiyamun tuṟainīr paṇṇaiyum vaṉmalai yure
yiṟṟoṉ malaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamuṅ kalaṅkā valviṉai yilaṅkācomamuṅ kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māppappāḷamum kāvalam puricai mevi
limpaṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟuṅ kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamum tītamar valviṉai maātamāliṅkamuṅkalāmutir kaṭu
ntiṟa lilāmuri tecamu teṉakkavārpoḻil māṉakkavāramun toṭukaṭaṟ kāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭkaṭāramu māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecari panmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī
rājentiracoḻa tevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattut tāmarkkoṭṭattu tāmarnāṭṭu parākkiramacoḻac
śaturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom yāṇṭu 2 10 3 Āvatu nammur perumaṇṭapattey kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak
kūṭi Iruntu nammūr melai subrahmaṇyadevaṟku tiruvamutukku coḻa maṇṭalattu veṟṟiyūr vāṭkai kārikuṭi kārikkuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉ teva
ṉ tevarpaṇṭārattu kuṭiñaikkallāl tuḷainiṟai vaitta poṉ Eṇ kaḻaiñcu Ippoṉ Eṇkaḻañcum sabhaiyome
y koṇṭu Ippoṉṉukku vaikkiṉṟa bhūmiyākiṉṟatu Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai ciṟuneṉmali viḷainilam Āyirattu Irunū
ṟṟu Irupattañcu kuḻikkum kiḻpāṟkellai ciṟuneṉmali kayattukkum Ikkoṭṭattu kariveṭunāṭu Aṟiyūr Ellaikku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai
Innāṭṭu mummaṭicoḻapurattellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai paṭuvūrk koṭṭattu paṭuvūr nāṭṭu brahmadeyam muññai taṇṭalattu El
laikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kumarataṇṭavāykkālukku teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Āyirattu Irunūṟṟu Irupattañcu kuḻiyum Idevar pa
ṇṭārattu yāṇṭu 2 10 6 Āvatu sabhaiyoṅkoṇṭa kācu Eṭṭu (ma)kkum meṟpaṭiyūril tiruvamutukku vaitta kollainilam Iru ku
ḻikkum kiḻpāṟkellai maṇaṟpākkattu Iḷaiyanampi cūtakkirama vittaṉṉāvikkum Uḷḷāḷūr [ teven=tara] kkiramavittaṉ bhūmikkum tevatāṉam
nilattukkum meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kumarataṇṭa vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai muññai taṇṭalat tellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ
kellai vekkamaṅkalattu kayittukkuRead- kayattukkuteṟkum Innāṉkellaiyuḷḷum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilattil vaṭakkaṭaiya teṉ vaṭaley Araikkol Akalam niro
ṭu vāykkāl pokap peṟuvārkaḷākavum Ipparicuviṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom Isa
bhaiyil Eḻuntu paṇiccom pākkattu kāmakoṭi paṭṭanum māṅkāṭṭuc ceṭṭacanmakkiramavittanum paṟiyalūr Akkicanmakki
ramavittaṉum paṟiyalūr mādhavakkiramavittaṉum Ivarkaḷ paṇiyāl Eḻutineṉ Ivvūr maddhyasthaṉ śrīpontai Ēkāmparaṉāṉa mahājaṉa
ppiriyaneṉ Ivai Enneḻuttu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattut tāmaṟ koṭṭattu tāmar nāṭṭu parākkiramacoḻaccaruppetima
ṅkalattu subramaṇyadevarāna coḻa keraḷan(r) tirumunnāḻikai Uṭaiya civabrāhmaṇar kāśyapan Araicu bhāradvāci Ampala
kūttanum pallavaram Uṭaiyāṉ Iūr ceytum Okka Aṉupavittu kāśayapaṉ ciricam paṭṭannum nākatevaṉnum yāṇṭu varai Uṭaiya
ceytu Okka Anupavittu Akka maṅkalattu pilāṅ kollaiyil kiḻakkaṭaiya kuḻinūṟuṅkoṇṭu Oru nantāviḷakku
tantām Eṉṉa pāti Erippomānom Ivvaṉaivom Ipparicu śrīkāriyam ceykiṉṟa subramaṇya cogi
ṭi kalveṭṭi kuṭuttom Ivanaivom Ivvūr madhyastanāna śrī poṉtai Utaiyadivākaraṉneṉ yivai Enneḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 30.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
